displayName: MES Platform (BL-164 / BL-165 / BL-166 / BL-167 / BL-168 / BL-170 / BL-193)

migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_platform_line (line_code VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY, display_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, area_path VARCHAR(256)); INSERT INTO mes_platform_line (line_code, display_name, area_path) SELECT 'LINE-A01', 'Assembly Line A01', 'root.platform.mes.instances.plant-a.areas.assembly.lines.line-a01' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_platform_line WHERE line_code = 'LINE-A01'); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_oee_shift (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, line_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, shift_label VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, planned_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL, downtime_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL, ideal_cycle_sec INTEGER NOT NULL, total_units INTEGER NOT NULL, good_units INTEGER NOT NULL); INSERT INTO mes_oee_shift (id, line_code, shift_label, planned_minutes, downtime_minutes, ideal_cycle_sec, total_units, good_units) SELECT 'dddddddd-dddd-dddd-dddd-dddddddddddd', 'LINE-A01', 'Morning', 480, 45, 12, 2100, 2050 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE line_code = 'LINE-A01' AND shift_label = 'Morning');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_spc_sample (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, line_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, measurement_mm NUMERIC(8,3) NOT NULL, sample_ts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP); INSERT INTO mes_spc_sample (id, line_code, measurement_mm) SELECT 'eeeeeeee-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee', 'LINE-A01', 10.02 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_spc_sample WHERE id = 'eeeeeeee-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee'); INSERT INTO mes_spc_sample (id, line_code, measurement_mm) SELECT 'eeeeeeee-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeef', 'LINE-A01', 9.98 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_spc_sample WHERE id = 'eeeeeeee-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeef'); INSERT INTO mes_spc_sample (id, line_code, measurement_mm) SELECT 'eeeeeeee-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeee0', 'LINE-A01', 10.05 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_spc_sample WHERE id = 'eeeeeeee-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeee0'); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_erp_outbox (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, entity_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, entity_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, idempotency_key VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE, status VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, processed_at TIMESTAMP NULL); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_batch_run (batch_path VARCHAR(256) PRIMARY KEY, batch_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, recipe VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, phase VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'idle', updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP); INSERT INTO mes_batch_run (batch_path, batch_id, recipe, phase) SELECT 'root.platform.mes.lots.batch-line-a01-001', 'BATCH-LINE-A01-001', 'recipe-standard-a', 'charge' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_batch_run WHERE batch_path = 'root.platform.mes.lots.batch-line-a01-001');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_genealogy_material (material_code VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY, display_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, uom VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EA'); INSERT INTO mes_genealogy_material (material_code, display_name, uom) SELECT 'MAT-WIDGET-A01', 'Assembly widget A01', 'EA' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_genealogy_material WHERE material_code = 'MAT-WIDGET-A01'); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_genealogy_lot (lot_id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY, lot_path VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, material_code VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, work_order_number VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, line_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, quantity NUMERIC(12,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'); INSERT INTO mes_genealogy_lot (lot_id, lot_path, material_code, work_order_number, line_code, quantity, status) SELECT 'BATCH-LINE-A01-001', 'root.platform.mes.lots.batch-line-a01-001', 'MAT-WIDGET-A01', 'WO-LINE-A01-001', 'LINE-A01', 2050, 'active' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_genealogy_lot WHERE lot_id = 'BATCH-LINE-A01-001'); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_genealogy_quality (quality_id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY, lot_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, defect_code VARCHAR(64), severity VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ok', result VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pass', recorded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP); INSERT INTO mes_genealogy_quality (quality_id, lot_id, defect_code, severity, result) SELECT 'QR-LINE-A01-001', 'BATCH-LINE-A01-001', NULL, 'ok', 'pass' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_genealogy_quality WHERE quality_id = 'QR-LINE-A01-001'); INSERT INTO mes_genealogy_quality (quality_id, lot_id, defect_code, severity, result) SELECT 'QR-LINE-A01-002', 'BATCH-LINE-A01-001', 'SCRATCH', 'minor', 'ncr' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_genealogy_quality WHERE quality_id = 'QR-LINE-A01-002');

objects.description: Seed work order for LINE-A01 (BL-164 / BL-166)

objects.name: line-a01
objects.description: Assembly Line A01 — OEE / dispatch target

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"shifts","sql":"SELECT id::text AS shift_id, line_code, shift_label, planned_minutes, downtime_minutes, total_units, good_units FROM mes_oee_shift ORDER BY line_code, shift_label"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${shifts}","fields":{"shiftId":"${item.shift_id}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","shiftLabel":"${item.shift_label}","plannedMinutes":"${item.planned_minutes}","downtimeMinutes":"${item.downtime_minutes}","totalUnits":"${item.total_units}","goodUnits":"${item.good_units}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"kpi","sql":"SELECT line_code, shift_label, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 THEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 100.0 / planned_minutes ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS availability_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN LEAST(100.0, ideal_cycle_sec * total_units * 100.0 / ((planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 60)) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS performance_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN total_units > 0 THEN good_units * 100.0 / total_units ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS quality_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN (CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 THEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 1.0 / planned_minutes ELSE 0 END) * (CASE WHEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN LEAST(1.0, ideal_cycle_sec * total_units * 1.0 / ((planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 60)) ELSE 0 END) * (CASE WHEN total_units > 0 THEN good_units * 1.0 / total_units ELSE 0 END) * 100 ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS oee_pct FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"kpi","message":"Shift not found"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","lineCode":"${kpi.line_code}","shiftLabel":"${kpi.shift_label}","availabilityPct":"${kpi.availability_pct}","performancePct":"${kpi.performance_pct}","qualityPct":"${kpi.quality_pct}","oeePct":"${kpi.oee_pct}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"shift","sql":"SELECT id, downtime_minutes, planned_minutes FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"shift","message":"Shift not found"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_oee_shift SET downtime_minutes = LEAST(planned_minutes, downtime_minutes + ?) WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.minutes}","${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"updated","sql":"SELECT downtime_minutes FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","downtimeMinutes":"${updated.downtime_minutes}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"lines","sql":"SELECT line_code, display_name, area_path FROM mes_platform_line ORDER BY line_code"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${lines}","fields":{"lineCode":"${item.line_code}","displayName":"${item.display_name}","areaPath":"${item.area_path}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"samples","sql":"SELECT id::text AS sample_id, line_code, measurement_mm, sample_ts::text AS sample_ts FROM mes_spc_sample ORDER BY sample_ts DESC LIMIT 20"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${samples}","fields":{"sampleId":"${item.sample_id}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","measurementMm":"${item.measurement_mm}","sampleTs":"${item.sample_ts}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"links","sql":"SELECT l.lot_id, l.lot_path, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, l.quantity, l.status AS lot_status, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.severity, '') AS severity, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result, COALESCE(q.recorded_at::text, '') AS recorded_at FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id ORDER BY l.lot_id, q.recorded_at"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${links}","fields":{"lotId":"${item.lot_id}","lotPath":"${item.lot_path}","materialCode":"${item.material_code}","materialName":"${item.material_name}","workOrderNumber":"${item.work_order_number}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","lotStatus":"${item.lot_status}","qualityId":"${item.quality_id}","defectCode":"${item.defect_code}","severity":"${item.severity}","qualityResult":"${item.quality_result}","recordedAt":"${item.recorded_at}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"links","sql":"SELECT l.lot_id, l.lot_path, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, l.quantity, l.status AS lot_status, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.severity, '') AS severity, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result, COALESCE(q.recorded_at::text, '') AS recorded_at FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id WHERE l.lot_id = ? ORDER BY q.recorded_at","params":["${input.lotId}"]},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${links}","fields":{"lotId":"${item.lot_id}","lotPath":"${item.lot_path}","materialCode":"${item.material_code}","materialName":"${item.material_name}","workOrderNumber":"${item.work_order_number}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","lotStatus":"${item.lot_status}","qualityId":"${item.quality_id}","defectCode":"${item.defect_code}","severity":"${item.severity}","qualityResult":"${item.quality_result}","recordedAt":"${item.recorded_at}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","lotId":"${input.lotId}","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_batch_run SET phase = ?, batch_id = ?, recipe = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), recipe), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.phase}","${input.batchId}","${input.recipe}","${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"updated","sql":"SELECT batch_path FROM mes_batch_run WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"when","var":"updated","notNull":false,"then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO mes_batch_run (batch_path, batch_id, recipe, phase) VALUES (?, ?, COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), 'default-recipe'), ?)","params":["${input.batchPath}","${input.batchId}","${input.recipe}","${input.phase}"]}]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","batchPath":"${input.batchPath}","phase":"${input.phase}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"batch","sql":"SELECT batch_id, recipe, phase FROM mes_batch_run WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"batch","message":"Batch not found"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","batchPath":"${input.batchPath}","batchId":"${batch.batch_id}","recipe":"${batch.recipe}","phase":"${batch.phase}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO mes_erp_outbox (id, entity_type, entity_id, payload_json, idempotency_key, status) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), ?, ?, ?, CONCAT(?, ':', ?), 'pending' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_erp_outbox WHERE idempotency_key = CONCAT(?, ':', ?))","params":["${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}","${input.payloadJson}","${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}","${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"keyRow","sql":"SELECT CONCAT(?, ':', ?) AS idempotency_key","params":["${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","enqueued":true,"idempotencyKey":"${keyRow.idempotency_key}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"pending","sql":"SELECT id::text AS outbox_id, entity_type, entity_id, idempotency_key FROM mes_erp_outbox WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 50"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_erp_outbox SET status = 'sent', processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE status = 'pending'"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${pending}","fields":{"outboxId":"${item.outbox_id}","entityType":"${item.entity_type}","entityId":"${item.entity_id}","idempotencyKey":"${item.idempotency_key}","status":"sent"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

workflows.bpmnXml: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:ispf="http://ispf.io/bpmn" targetNamespace="http://ispf.io/bpmn"><process id="mes-work-order-dispatch" name="MES Work Order Dispatch" isExecutable="true"><startEvent id="start" name="Start"/><serviceTask id="notifyDispatch" name="Log dispatch" ispf:action="log" ispf:message="mes-platform: work order dispatched"/><userTask id="confirmStart" name="Confirm work order start" ispf:title="Confirm work order start" ispf:instructions="Review the dispatched work order and confirm operator acceptance" ispf:assigneeRole="operator" ispf:targetObject="root.platform.devices.mes-platform-hub" ispf:function="mes_dispatch_confirmWorkOrder"/><endEvent id="end" name="End"/><sequenceFlow id="f1" sourceRef="start" targetRef="notifyDispatch"/><sequenceFlow id="f2" sourceRef="notifyDispatch" targetRef="confirmStart"/><sequenceFlow id="f3" sourceRef="confirmStart" targetRef="end"/></process></definitions>

Work order dispatch workflow + operator work-queue (BL-166). Fire workOrderDispatched on the hub to start the BPMN user task.

"}]}

"}]}

metadata.changelog: 1.3.0 — BL-164…168/170 Done evidence: seed typed MES instances + ISA-95 line path, batch Operator dashboard, dispatch confirm writes WO status; BL-169 deferred (ERP stub only)

reports.title: MES Genealogy
reports.query: SELECT l.lot_id, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, l.quantity, l.status AS lot_status, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.severity, '') AS severity, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id ORDER BY l.lot_id, q.quality_id

reports.title: MES Genealogy by lot
reports.description: Filter genealogy graph by lot id (seed: BATCH-LINE-A01-001)
reports.query: SELECT l.lot_id, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id WHERE l.lot_id = ? ORDER BY q.quality_id
